creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

when installing gdm it executes commands but some commands are failing

[1/1] Installing gdm-3.28.4_6...
===> Creating groups.
Using existing group 'gdm'.
Using existing group 'video'.
===> Creating users
Using existing user 'gdm'.
===> Creating homedir(s)
[1/1] Extracting gdm-3.28.4_6: 100%
/bin/sh: gconftool-2: not found
chown: /usr/local/etc/gdm/home/.gconf.mandatory: No such file or directory
chmod: /usr/local/etc/gdm/home/.gconf.mandatory: No such file or directory
chmod: /usr/local/etc/gdm/home/.gconf.mandatory/*.xml: No such file or directory
